title: Hierarchy Studio
description: Build and edit hierarchical data, then explore it as a Sunburst, Icicle, or Treemap with click-to-zoom drill-down.
concept: A live hierarchical-data visualization builder. Edit a tree of nodes directly (rename, add child/sibling, delete, set leaf values), then switch between three classic hierarchy layouts — radial Sunburst, horizontal Icicle rows, and a nested slice-and-dice Treemap. Click any segment to zoom into that subtree with a breadcrumb trail, or zoom back out. Five color themes shade each top-level branch consistently across all three views.
features: 3 render modes: Sunburst, Icicle, Treemap — same data, different layouts
Live tree editor: add child/sibling, rename, delete, set leaf value
Click-to-zoom drill-down with breadcrumb navigation across all modes
5 built-in datasets (Traffic, Budget, Org Chart, Randomize) plus named presets saved to localStorage
5 color themes with consistent per-branch hue shading
Export current view as PNG, export/import full tree as JSON
Shareable URL — encodes the whole tree + view state in the link hash

interaction.mouse: Hover a segment for a value/percentage tooltip; click to zoom into that subtree
interaction.click: Click a wedge/row/rect to drill down; click the center circle or Zoom Out button to go back up
interaction.touch: Tap a segment to drill in; tap Zoom Out or a breadcrumb crumb to go back
interaction.keyboard: Tab through drawer controls; type directly into node name/value fields to edit the tree
